docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-04-2005 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPT OF PETN FOR COURT APPROVAL OF A TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETT PAYMENT RIGHTS FILED BY PETITIONER SETTLEMENT FUNDING,LLC D/B/A PEACHTREE SETTLEMENT FUNDING
NOTICE OF REQUEST TO APPEAR TELEPHONICALLY; FILED BY PETITIONER

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT KENEISHA JONES PRESENT IN PROPRIA PERSONA. NO OTHER APPEARANCES. PETITIONER SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC'S NOTICE OF HEARING IS DENIED FOR INSUFFICIENT SERVICE. INSURANCE CODE 10139.5(C)(2) PROVIDES THAT ALL MOVING PAPERS FOR THIS MOTION SHALL BE SERVED AND FILED WITH THE COURT NO LATER THAN 20 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING. IN THIS CASE, THE MOVING PARTY FILED THE MOVING PAPERS ON 2/15/05, ONLY 17 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING-NO OPPOSITION FILED. HON. JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR #1558
LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC'S AMENDED NOTICE OF HEARING IS GRANTED. JUDGE: JAMES WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER SETTLEMENT FUNDING,LLC D/B/A PEACHTREE SETTLEMENT FUNDING AS TO RESPONDENT JONES, KENEISHA

calendar.matters:
Amended Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-08-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PETITIONER SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC'S Amended Notice Of Hearing is granted. (301/JLW/DS) REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR#1558

Ntc Of Hg
Off Calendar Mar-04-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Defendant Keneisha Jones present in propria persona
RULING:
No other appearances. PETITIONER SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC's notice of hearing is denied for insufficient service. Insurance Code 10139.5(c)(2) provides that all moving papers for this motion shall be served and filed with the court no later than 20 days before the hearing. In this case, the moving party filed the moving papers on 2/15/05, only 17 days before the hearing-no opposition filed. (301/JLW/CL-X) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
